message: E50+ on stock HPFP risks fueling faults and lean conditions under load. Upgrade HPFP internals first.
E30 on stock HPFP is borderline at higher boost; HPFP internals upgrade is recommended.
Stage 2 tune targets boost levels that require a downpipe to avoid excessive exhaust backpressure.
Full E85 exceeds HPFP flow capacity at boost; port injection is required for safe fueling.
High-stage tune on stock HPFP with 93 or lower limits safe boost ceiling and risks knock.
Running ethanol blends without an ethanol-aware tune risks lean A/F ratios and detonation under boost.
Above ~350 whp the OEM plastic charge pipes are a known failure point; aluminum upgrade recommended.
Methanol injection without a supporting tune that accounts for it may cause unpredictable fueling.
